reviews.review_description: I was extremely impressed by the quality of this tour (how is it free?) and the educational content within. It feels like you are actually standing inside George Washington's home and exploring his estate. You can click objects to learn more about them, and it contains so many videos of experts going into greater depth. This is a MUST for any lover of American history.

This was both visually and educationally appealing. Not only do you get to learn about various rooms of the house, but also numerous areas of the grounds, which I wasn't expecting. Different  experts provided a historical lens on  facets of life at that time. I found it engrossing.
